# Verify Google Maps / Local Review Manipulation

## Claim being tested

A local business rating reflects genuine customer experience.

## Alternative hypothesis

Reviews are fake, incentivized, suppressed, review-gated, or competitor-targeted.

## Data fields

- reviewer_id
- business_id
- timestamp
- rating
- text
- photos
- reviewer history
- geography
- incentive evidence
- owner responses
- review removal pattern

## Metrics

- rating burst
- reviewer geography mismatch
- text template similarity
- reviewer category concentration
- competitor-cross-review graph
- review-to-footfall plausibility
- photo reuse

## Safe conclusion

"Local review patterns show manipulation risk when timing, reviewer history, and text similarity deviate strongly from normal customer behaviour."
